title: RUSTINS Masonry Paint Matt White 250ml
features: Ultimate Weather Shield: Fortify your surfaces with Rustins Masonry Paint, delivering enduring weather resistance and a vibrant color palette for a long-lasting, protected exterior.
Effortless Application: Experience a smooth, easy application that eliminates drips, ensuring a professional finish on various surfaces such as concrete, brick, and stone.
Seamless Transformation: Swiftly achieve a flawless brickwork finish with Rustins Masonry Paint—ADD TO CART now for a seamless painting experience.
Versatile & Adaptable: Suitable for diverse surfaces, this masonry paint provides exceptional adhesion, offering versatility for both residential and commercial projects.
Low Odor Brilliance: Enjoy a painting process without unpleasant odors. Rustins Masonry Paint boasts a low odor formula, contributing to a comfortable and enjoyable application experience.
description: From the manufacturer Rustins MASPW500 Masonry Paint White Rustins Quick Dry Masonry Paint is a quick drying high performance paint that dries to a smooth matt finish. For interior and exterior use on masonry applications such as walls, cement, stone, tiles and bricks. Features: Water based Smooth matt finish For walls, cement, stone tiles and brick Interior & exterior 4 colours; Black, White, Cream and Red Where would I use this? For walls, cement, stone tiles and brick For interior & exterior use ABOUT RUSTINS In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London.
